title: Login endpoint returns 500 on empty password
body:
POST /api/login with `{"username": "admin", "password": ""}` crashes instead of returning 400.

Traceback points to `auth.py:45` — `bcrypt.checkpw` receives empty bytes.

title: Add pagination to /api/users endpoint
body: Currently returns all users in a single response. Need `?page=1&per_page=20` support.

title: CORS headers missing on preflight requests
body: Browser requests fail with CORS errors. The OPTIONS handler doesn't set Access-Control-Allow-Origin.

title: Migrate database from SQLite to PostgreSQL
body: SQLite doesn't support concurrent writes. We need to switch to PostgreSQL for production.

title: Write integration tests for auth endpoints
body: No test coverage for `/api/login`, `/api/logout`, `/api/register`. Need pytest fixtures + test cases.
